overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a busy futuristic city street in Cyberpunk 2077 during golden hour. Heavy traffic flows on the wet multi-lane road beside modern glass and brick architecture, with palm trees lining the pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with heavy traffic flow

events.description: scene transitions from dark fade-in to full golden hour exposure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside heavy traffic, approaching the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow taxi driving along the multi-lane road
pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall mixed-material building with red brick lower floors and glass curtain wall upper floors
distinctive futuristic building with green copper-colored tiered architecture and multiple levels
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge beyond the metal railing
blue metal railing running along the right edge of the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a fade from black into a golden hour cityscape. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane road. A prominent red brick and glass tower rises on the left, while palm trees line the right side beyond a metal railing. Heavy futuristic traffic flows continuously on the wet asphalt road.

events.description: blue street light pole enters from the right and passes across the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the sidewalk, passing a blue street light pole

notable_agents.action: dark sedan with brake lights on, slowing in traffic

entered.detail: curved blue metal street light pole with illuminated fixture at the top

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward as a blue street light pole enters the frame from the right, passes across the view, and moves to the left background. The red brick tower on the left grows larger as we approach, and the distinctive green tiered building ahead becomes more prominent. Traffic remains heavy with vehicles moving in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street approaching major intersection

events.description: vehicles ahead come to a stop at the intersection, creating a traffic jam

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the green tiered building, approaching the intersection where traffic has stopped

notable_agents.action: futuristic van stopped at the intersection with brake lights illuminated

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the intersection where the distinctive green tiered building dominates the center view. The blue street light pole has passed behind the camera. Traffic ahead has come to a stop, creating a queue of vehicles with illuminated brake lights. The red brick tower remains prominent on the left while the palm trees recede into the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a futuristic city sidewalk that transitions from a wide street view toward a congested urban intersection. It begins with a fade from black into a golden hour cityscape, moving past a red brick and glass tower on the left and palm trees lining a metal railing on the right. As the camera advances, a blue street light pole glides across the frame from right to left, while the red brick tower looms larger and a distinctive green tiered building emerges ahead. The scene then shifts toward the intersection as the blue pole recedes behind the camera and the green building dominates the center view. Finally, the forward motion leads toward a queue of stationary vehicles with glowing brake lights, while the palm trees fade into the distance.
